item.title: FIPRNet
item.description: Combines Frequency Interpolation Decomposition with Period-aware Regularization Patching. Derives a principled closed-form cutoff frequency from anti-imaging filtering theory. Published in Knowledge-Based Systems.

item.title: Frequency Interpolation with Period-aware Regularization for Robust Long-term Time Series Forecasting
Diffusion-Based Spatio-Temporal Channel Prediction via Non-Stationarity Decoupling
Channel, Trend and Periodic-Wise Representation Learning for Multivariate Long-term Time Series Forecasting
CTPNET
item.description: A novel framework that learns representations from three complementary perspectives: inter-channel dependencies, intra-subsequence trend variations, and inter-subsequence periodic patterns. Published at ICASSP 2026.

item.title: Channel Prediction Based on Spatially Dependent Diffusion Models
SDDM
item.description: A channel prediction scheme utilizing spatial dependence based on diffusion models. Extracts spatial and temporal correlations via transformers for denoising within the diffusion framework. Published at WCSP 2025 and IEEE TCCN.

item.title: TSFLib
item.description: A unified framework for time series forecasting research, supporting state-of-the-art models including CTPNET and FIPRNet. Features standardized benchmarking across multiple real-world datasets.
